name: Workiva
h1: Build AI Agents That Work with Workiva
metaTitle: Build AI Agents for Workiva with DocsBot Skill Builder
metaDescription: Create DocsBot AI agents that securely use Workiva data and workflows for customer support responses, internal research, approvals, summaries, and handoffs.
intro: Workiva helps teams manage compliance, reporting, controlled collaboration, and audit-ready processes across complex business workflows. With DocsBot Skill Builder, you can describe in plain language how an AI agent should use Workiva, and DocsBot helps design, secure, test, and deploy that ability as a reusable Skill. The result is an AI support or internal agent that can answer questions, gather context, prepare handoffs, summarize reporting status, and take approved actions inside your rules.
supportUseCases: Let a customer-facing DocsBot agent look up reporting or filing status stored in Workiva and give customers a current, policy-safe update in chat or over helpdesk tickets.
Use the agent to gather missing details from a customer, match them to the right Workiva record or workflow, and prepare a complete escalation handoff for your compliance or operations team.
Enable the agent to summarize document progress, review state, or outstanding steps from Workiva so customers receive clear next-step guidance without waiting for a manual response.
Have the agent trigger approved internal follow-up workflows based on a customer request, such as notifying the right team when regulated reporting or document review needs attention.
Use the agent to create a structured case summary from the customer conversation and relevant Workiva context so human teams can continue the issue with less back-and-forth.
internalUseCases: Let employees chat with a private DocsBot agent in Slack, Microsoft Teams, or a secure chat workspace to retrieve Workiva document status, workflow progress, reporting context, or linked process details.
Enable finance, compliance, and operations teams to ask the agent for summaries of outstanding tasks, review blockers, or reporting milestones across Workiva records and connected systems.

Use an internal agent to guide employees through standard operating procedures, collect required inputs, and trigger approved Workiva-related workflows without making teams search across multiple tools.
Allow team members to request audit-ready summaries, stakeholder handoff notes, or status digests that the agent generates from Workiva data and conversation context.
Help managers and project leads use the agent to research process state, prepare approvals, and coordinate next actions while keeping access scoped to the right records and teams.
whatYouCanBuild: An AI support agent that checks Workiva workflow or reporting status before replying to customers.
A private compliance assistant that summarizes document progress and outstanding review steps from Workiva.
An internal operations agent that gathers missing context and prepares escalations tied to Workiva records.
A finance team assistant that creates concise reporting status updates and stakeholder handoff summaries.
An employee chatbot that answers process questions using Workiva data and linked business context.
A bounded AI workflow that triggers approved follow-up actions when review conditions are met.

howItWorks.title: Describe the outcome
howItWorks.description: You tell Skill Builder what you want the agent to do with Workiva in plain language, such as checking reporting status, summarizing workflow state, preparing handoffs, or triggering an approved follow-up.

howItWorks.title: Skill Builder designs it
howItWorks.description: Skill Builder turns that goal into a reusable Skill, asks for any missing business context, and automatically decides the safest workflow design, required configuration values, and runtime behavior for the agent.

howItWorks.title: Connections are secured
howItWorks.description: Skill Builder defines secure connection and authentication handling, keeps credentials out of chats and Skill source, proxies secrets through approved runtime configuration, and scopes Workiva access to the minimum records, actions, and users needed.

howItWorks.title: Approvals and limits are added
howItWorks.description: Skill Builder adds approval boundaries and action limits for sensitive updates or workflow triggers so the agent can act within the rules you set instead of having broad unrestricted access.

howItWorks.title: Scenarios are tested
howItWorks.description: The automated testing agent runs imagined customer support and internal team scenarios, finds bugs, weak instructions, missing checks, or workflow gaps, and feeds those findings into an automated improvement loop.

faq.question: How can I build an AI agent that works with Workiva?
faq.answer: With DocsBot Skill Builder, you describe the Workiva workflow you want in plain language, and Skill Builder helps design, secure, test, and package that ability as a reusable Skill for your AI agent. The agent can then perform approved lookups, summaries, handoffs, and workflow actions inside the boundaries you define.

faq.question: Can an AI support agent use Workiva data when replying to customers?
faq.answer: Yes, a DocsBot support agent can use a Workiva Skill to retrieve status information, summarize process state, gather missing context, and prepare internal handoffs while responding in a website chat widget or helpdesk workflow. Access can be limited to the exact records and actions appropriate for customer support.

faq.question: What internal team workflows can a DocsBot AI assistant automate with Workiva?
faq.answer: Internal agents can help employees retrieve reporting status, summarize review progress, research document context, follow SOPs, prepare approvals, and trigger approved next steps across compliance, finance, and operations workflows. This is useful in private chat, Slack, or Microsoft Teams environments where teams need faster answers and safer action-taking.

faq.question: Can DocsBot safely trigger actions in Workiva instead of only answering questions?
faq.answer: Yes, DocsBot Skills can be designed for bounded AI Actions such as approved updates, workflow triggers, handoff creation, or summary generation. Skill Builder adds scoped permissions, secure secret handling, and approval boundaries so actions stay controlled.

faq.question: How does DocsBot keep Workiva credentials and access secure?
faq.answer: Skill Builder identifies the connection details the workflow needs, stores and proxies secrets through secure runtime configuration, and keeps credentials out of chat transcripts and generated Skill content. It also scopes access to the minimum users, records, and actions required for the workflow.

faq.question: Can I use a Workiva AI assistant for compliance and reporting teams?
faq.answer: Yes, private DocsBot agents can support compliance, finance, and reporting teams by answering process questions, summarizing document state, surfacing blockers, and helping employees complete repeatable workflows. The setup can be tailored to your controls, approval rules, and record visibility requirements.

brand.title: Workiva
brand.description: Workiva Inc. is a cloud-based compliance and regulatory reporting solutions provider. The company offers a platform that enables controlled collaboration, data linking, and process management, serving public and private companies, government agencies, and higher-education institutions worldwide. With its Wdesk platform, Workiva powers transparency and assured integrated reporting, transforming how customers connect data, unify processes, and empower teams in a secure, audit-ready, AI-powered, collaborative environment.
brand.slogan: Powering transparency with the world's leading cloud platform
